title: Section 1
content: This Act may be called the Suits Valuation Act, 1887 1[and it extends2 to the whole of India except the territories which, immediately before the 1st November, 1956, were comprised in Part B States.]
footnote: 1. Added by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 2) Order, 1956. 2. Extended to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and Union territory of Ladakh by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10-2019).
